data.content: Implementation review rejected (5th attempt). 10 ESLint violations remain across 7 in-scope files — identical to the 4th rejection. Specific violations: (1) beat-detail.tsx max-len lines 352, 371; (2) beat-form.tsx BeatForm 176 lines vs 100 limit; (3) beat-metadata-details.tsx max-len line 191; (4) move-to-project-dialog.tsx MoveToProjectDialog 110 lines vs 100 limit; (5) notes-dialog.tsx max-len line 29; (6) settings-dispatch-global-swap.tsx SettingsDispatchGlobalSwap 145 lines vs 100 limit + unused formatAgentLabel; (7) settings-sheet.tsx SettingsSheet 161 lines vs 100 limit + max-len line 119. These files were not modified by recent commits. The implementer must: break long functions into extracted sub-components, and wrap/shorten long lines. All other gates (tsc, tests, build) pass.
